title: Nod Protocol Manifest v0.2
description: JSON Schema for the lean v0.2 nod core manifest. Core describes the merchant's identity, classification (NAICS + GBP), addresses, contact info, and hours — the parts universal to every business. Agent-commerce concerns (discovery, transactions, information, support, agent policies) live in the ai.opennod.agent-commerce extension. Industry-specific Schema.org properties live in the ai.opennod.schema-org-extension extension. Narrative/voice fields live in the ai.opennod.merchant-voice extension. See spec/nod-protocol-v0.2.md.

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema for validation.

nod_version.description: Protocol version. Must match a published version. v0.2 is a breaking change from v0.1; see CHANGELOG.md.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of when this manifest was last generated/updated.

extensions.description: Reverse-domain-namespaced extensions. The agent-commerce surface lives at extensions["ai.opennod.agent-commerce"] and is required for any merchant intending to be transacted with by agents.

business.description: Core business identity, classification, and basic metadata. Universal across all businesses.

name.description: Business name as it appears to customers.

naics_code.description: Primary NAICS 2022 industry code. Required. Use the most specific applicable code (typically 6-digit national-industry). The three published range sectors (31-33 Manufacturing, 44-45 Retail Trade, 48-49 Transportation and Warehousing) are valid as written. Pattern validation only — semantic validation against taxonomy/naics-2022.json is the consumer's responsibility.

gbp_primary_category.description: Primary Google Business Profile category. Required. v0.2 accepts free string with no enum constraint pending an authoritative GBP category list (see taxonomy/gbp-categories.README.md). A future protocol revision may tighten this to enum-validated against taxonomy/gbp-categories.json.

gbp_secondary_categories.description: Additional GBP categories, in priority order. Same free-string semantics as gbp_primary_category for v0.2.

url.description: Primary business URL — must match the serving domain.

legal_name.description: Legal entity name. Often differs from `name`.

dba_names.description: Doing-business-as names this entity also operates under.

description.description: Plain-language description of what the business does.

categories.description: Free-form business category tags. Distinct from naics_code (industry classification) and gbp_primary_category (Google's taxonomy).

logo.description: URL to a business logo image.

founded.description: Year (or full date) the business was founded.

social.description: Social media profile URLs keyed by network.

schema_org.description: URL to a Schema.org JSON-LD document for this business. Distinct from extensions["ai.opennod.schema-org-extension"], which carries inline industry-specific Schema.org properties.

oneOf.description: Split hours (e.g. lunch and dinner service).
